dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: AC-10 is not met: the contaminated E2E fixture stops at unapproved execute, while the only approved execute/verify path uses a separate safe fixture with no install-artifact contamination or protected-file conflict.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: The protected-conflict plan application path is untested; tests/integration/test-merge-e2e.sh only applies an approved plan for the safe fixture explicitly described as having no protected-path touches.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The documented /furrow:merge interface includes dry-run/skip-verify/resume orchestration, but bin/frw only exposes separate merge-audit/classify/resolve-plan/execute/verify subcommands and no merge orchestrator.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: Wave-3 ownership is limited to merge command/scripts/policy/tests, but the submitted changes include out-of-scope files such as install.sh, bin/rws, schemas/reintegration.schema.json, and many .furrow artifacts without per-file justification.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: shellcheck fails delivered files, including SC2148 in bin/frw.d/hooks/script-guard.sh and SC3001 POSIX-sh process substitution in bin/frw.d/scripts/merge-sort-union.sh.
